case_title: HUA JIANG VS. QIAO ZHEN GUAN

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY JIANG, HUA GUAN, QIAO ZHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, HUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUAN, QIAO ZHEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, QIAO ZHEN
DECLARATION (UPDATING DEFENDANT'S TELEPHONE NUMBER AND PROVIDING A BACK UP TELEPHONE NUMBER) FILED BY DEFENDANT GUAN, QIAO ZHEN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JIANG, HUA AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, QIAO ZHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, HUA AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, QIAO ZHEN
DECLARATION (UPDATING PLAINTIFF'S TELEPHONE INFORMATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, HUA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO DEC-11-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUA JIANG IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY-CERTIFIED MANDARIN-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT QIAO ZHEN GUAN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY-CERTIFIED CANTONESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PARTIES ARE INFORMED THIS MATTER MUST BE CONTINUED BECAUSE THE PRO TEM JUDGE SCHEDULED FOR TODAY HAS FALLEN ILL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF HUA JIANG APPEARED, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER HSIN-JU CHANG. DEFENDANT QIAO ZHEN GUAN APPEARED, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
